name: Git Glide GUI
iteration_focus: v3.8.1 stabilization: central version source-of-truth, stable runtime script names, and reduced release churn
added: Stable split script part filenames that no longer change each release
Runtime version lookup from VERSION through Get-GitGlideVersion
Static smoke checks updated to validate stable runtime script names
next_recommended: v3.9.0: guided conflict resolution assistant and safer merge workflow automation
v3.10.0: interactive rebase and commit cleanup workflows
v3.11.0: CI/CD and pull-request workflow integration
highlights: Restores clearer merge support that had become hidden or too current-branch dependent
Supports the real workflow: push feature upstream, merge selected feature into develop, run checks, merge develop into main
Keeps every merge/push action previewable and confirmation-based
iteration_highlights: Merge & Publish checklist preview for feature -> develop -> main
Merged feature branch cleanup command plans
Static release consistency checks for version drift
Updated README and repository workflow guidance
